nodes.label: Hero Image
nodes.description: Isometric illustration of two stacked rounded rectangular layers. The top layer is outlined in light grey (wireframe style, empty/white), and the bottom layer is filled with a purple-to-violet gradient with reflective shading. The overall aesthetic is minimal and modern, suggesting layered data, platforms, or UI depth. Likely used as a decorative hero graphic conveying technology, structure, or a platform concept for an education management application.
nodes.design_intent: Abstract tech/platform metaphor; purple brand colour aligns with EduSync design system; isometric style conveys professionalism and modernity
nodes.intended_audience: Students, parents, educators using EduSync platform
